item.title: Chapter I: Devops
item.description: Foundation and tip tricks linux link file: ln -S <file_link> <file_root> file_link: you want to create a new file here file_root: the content of this file will be link to file_link, if file root have any change it will change at file link too. https://docs.lnav.org/en/latest/intro.html#viewing-logs: view log navigation Config dockerize react app, build production, hot reload. https://mherman.org/blog/dockerizing-a-react-app/
